title: Senior Doctor - Johnson & Johnson India - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Senior Doctor - Johnson & Johnson India - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
Johnson & Johnson India has an exciting opening for a Senior Doctor at our Ahmedabad office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Johnson & Johnson India:
Johnson & Johnson India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Health Informatics
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in CPT Codes

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Johnson & Johnson India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
